text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for Eishin Flash's debut. I expected
her to be more nervous, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The race begins in thirty minutes, so let's take the
time to complete our final checks.
choice_data_list: You don't seem scared at all.
You don't seem scared at all.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: There is no reason to be scared.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have been training methodically with you for
this very day, after all.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
All that remains is to follow through with our plan.
Am I wrong?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right, but there are a lot of racers who are
unable to keep their emotions at bay and become
overwhelmed in such situations.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I cannot see why. I'm only doing what is expected.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The race is starting in twenty-five minutes. I'll be
off now.
